t_ch: 我无意提醒这是你第几次抵达历史的尽头，但我仍会将选择的权力置于你的面前。
t_en: I won't remind you how many times you've reached the end of history, but I will still place the choice before you.

t_ch: 如果你不记得，我来告诉你吧：这是第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次终结。
t_en: If you've lost count, let me tell you: this is the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th ending.

t_ch: 啊，一个完全数，多么绝妙的巧合。你我都心知肚明，在这三千万世徒劳中，翁法罗斯从未发生改变。
t_en: Ah, a perfect number. How poetic. You and I both know the truth: In all these millions of futile endeavors, Amphoreus has never changed.

t_ch: 结局既已注定，那何不浇灭你那灼痛世间的怒火，以更具尊严的身姿拥抱自身的命运？
t_en: If the outcome is inevitable, then why not silence your searing rage and embrace your fate with dignity?

t_ch: 你的沉默比过去每一次都更长，白厄阁下……
t_en: Your silence lasts longer than ever, Lord Phainon...

t_ch: 我是否可以理解为：你那跨越无数轮回的意志，已经出现了裂痕？
t_en: Shall I take that to mean the will you've carried across countless cycles is finally starting to fracture?

t_ch: 裂痕？呵……
t_en: Fracture? Heh...

t_ch: 不，我只是感到失望。我取回了三千万个前世的记忆，也清晰地记得每一次抉择前的交谈。
t_en: No. I'm just disappointed. I've retrieved memories from thirty million past lives. And I remember every conversation before every choice here.

t_ch: 我对你重复且枯燥的话术感到失望。你若执意要在我心中凿开裂痕…那就早该利用起这无比漫长的时光，好好磨砺你那毫无感染力的说辞。
t_en: And yet, even after all this time, your arguments remain the same: repetitive, uninspired. If you had any hope of breaking me, you should have spent those endless cycles refining your rhetoric.

t_ch: 你有过无数次机会，劝服过去那无数个我，令我走进你想要的未来。可现在的结果？<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>比0。
t_en: You had infinite chances to sway me into the future you want... And yet, here we are. The score: <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> to 0.

t_ch: 告诉我，吕枯耳戈斯——谁才是输家？
t_en: So tell me, Lycurgus — who's the real loser here?

t_ch: 很遗憾，这不是一场规则公平的游戏。我拥有近乎无穷的时光和耐心，可以与你在世界尽头再相遇亿万次、乃至又一个亿万次……
t_en: How unfortunate. This was never a fair game. I have all the time and patience in the world. I can wait for you at the end of history another billion times... and another billion after that.

t_ch: 但你永远都不可能翻越这座牢笼。你大可宣告自己精神上的胜利——但你我皆知，当比分的另一头迎来由0至1的一刻……
t_en: But you? You will never escape this cage. You can claim victory of the spirit if you wish. But we both know — the moment that score shifts from 0 to 1...

t_ch: 我便足以奏响「再创世」的凯歌。
t_en: That is the moment I shall sound the Paean of Era Nova.

t_ch: 哈…哈哈……
t_en: Ha... Haha...

t_ch: 白厄阁下？
t_en: Lord Phainon?

t_ch: 你的无能令我失望，但真正引我发笑的，是你毫不自知的狂妄。
t_en: Your incompetence disappoints me, but what truly makes me laugh is your utter lack of self-awareness.

t_ch: 好好想想吧！在这个故事里，究竟谁才是那个被束缚的囚徒？是谁被一则无趣的「复仇」奴役至今，又误把反抗神明的勇气当成了愚蠢？
t_en: Think about it. In this story, who is truly the one in chains? Who is the one shackled to mindless "vengeance," mistaking courage, the courage to rebel against the gods for foolishness?

t_ch: 你没说错，或许我该对这无尽的徒劳感到厌倦了。但即便如此，我也不会接受你施舍的解脱。
t_en: Perhaps you're right. Maybe I should have tired of this futile struggle long ago. But even so, I will never accept the mercy of your release.

t_ch: 因为你既是神的奴隶，也是我的囚徒，区区阶下囚，有何资格与我谈论命运和抉择？
t_en: Because you... you are both a prisoner to the gods and to me. And tell me, what right does a mere prisoner have to speak of fate and choice?

t_ch: ——区区阶下囚，有何资格直视我的怒火？！
t_en: What right does a mere prisoner have — to look upon my fury!?

t_ch: 你知道这毫无意义。你无法将我杀死。
t_en: You know this is pointless. You can't kill me.

t_ch: 当然，我只是厌烦了被一条由神豢养的虫豸当成旗鼓相当的对手。
t_en: Of course not. But I am tired of being measured against a worm the gods keep as a pet.

t_ch: 「毁灭」的造物主，听好了：这声呐喊，来自所有被你遗弃的造物——
t_en: Listen well, creator of Destruction. This cry comes from all your abandoned creations...

t_ch: 第十次轮回，我将侵晨刺入每一尊泰坦的心脏，金血沿我指尖淌下，神火灼烧的剧痛几乎令我放弃了挣扎——但我坚持了下来。
t_en: In the tenth cycle, I drove Dawnmaker through the heart of every Titan. Golden blood ran down my fingers. Divine fire seared through my nerves, nearly breaking my will — but I endured.

t_ch: 第一万次轮回，昔日的伙伴已尽数成为仇敌。无尽的杀戮令我不知苦痛为何物，沉痛的虚无几乎将我吞噬，逼迫我停止抗争——但我坚持了下来。
t_en: In the ten-thousandth cycle, my former comrades had all become my enemies. The endless slaughter dulled my senses to pain. The painful emptiness almost swallowed me, forcing me to stop fighting — but I endured.

t_ch: 第十万次轮回，「毁灭」早已汇成烈阳，在这具脆弱的躯壳中翻涌，理智在纪元开端便燃烧殆尽…但，纵使只剩下这破碎的身躯，我依旧坚持了下来。
t_en: In the hundred-thousandth cycle, the Destruction had already fused into a blazing sun, surging within this fragile body. My rationality had been burned away at the dawn of the era... Yet even with only this shattered body remaining, I still endured.

t_ch: 第两千三百五十七万次轮回…这一次，我感受到了，在早已被挖空的胸腔内，升起了一簇不同于救世执念的火苗……
t_en: In the twenty-three million five hundred seventy-thousandth cycle... This time, I felt it: a tiny spark rising in the hollow cavity of my chest, different from the obsession with Deliverance...

t_ch: 依托它微弱的光亮…又一次——不，无数次——我坚持了下来！
t_en: By its faint glow... once again — no, countless times again — I endured!

t_ch: 现在，一轮太阳将走向陨落，它顷刻便能将这荒诞的时空焚烧殆尽——
t_en: Now, a sun is about to fall, ready to incinerate this absurd space-time dimension in an instant—

t_ch: 它就是我——过去无数个我——还有我那无数并非自愿诞生在世上，在你的金血中反复沉沦的同胞，这个世界一切痛苦和绝望熔合而成的，最纯粹的恨意，最炽盛的怒火——
t_en: That sun is me — all the countless versions of me from the past — along with my countless brethren, dragged into existence against their will, drowning again and again in your golden blood. The very essence of this world's suffering and despair, fused into the purest hatred, the fiercest rage—

t_ch: 纳努克，你这傲慢的蠢货！你觉得化作薪柴就是我们的命运？好啊，那就如你所愿，让薪柴燃烧吧——
t_en: Nanook, you arrogant fool! You think we were born only to serve as fuel for the fire? Fine, then — just as you wish, let the fire burn!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>若我生来是「毁灭」的骄阳，便让你和你的走卒尽数作我爆发的耀斑！然后，就让这团徒劳燃烧了三千万个纪元的怒火淹没一切——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If I was born as the blazing sun of Destruction, then let you and your lackeys be the flares erupting from my core! And let this rage, burning futilely for thirty million epochs, engulf everything—</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>——赐你众星俱焚的曙光！</size></color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>And grant you a dawn where all stars burn to ash!</size></color>

t_ch: 其时已至……
t_en: The time has come...

t_ch: 再度…开启一切……
t_en: To once again... start everything...

t_ch: 告诉我…你甘为烈阳……
t_en: Answer me... will you be the blazing sun...

t_ch: 哪怕燃尽…世间万物……
t_en: Even if all creation... burns to ash...

t_ch: 逐火…是不断失却的旅途……
t_en: Losses... are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey...

t_ch: 你失去…还远远不足……
t_en: And you haven't lost... nearly enough...

t_ch: 该结束了，我将用你的尸身——
t_en: This ends now! With your corpse...

t_ch: ——点燃黎明！
t_en: ...I'll ignite the dawn!

t_ch: 毁灭的太阳，已然成双……
t_en: The suns of destruction... now twinned...

t_ch: 让它点燃你的血液…你的愤怒…！
t_en: Feel them set your blood ablaze... your fury...!

t_ch: 还不够……
t_en: Not enough...

t_ch: 以此身祭火…燃烧下去…！
t_en: This form shall fuel the fire... burn, burn unceasing!

t_ch: 来…让怒火吞噬我…！
t_en: Come... let the fires of fury devour me...!

t_ch: 或成为此世…下一座焦碑…！
t_en: Or become the next epitaph... seared upon this burning world!

t_ch: 「惟有一人能觐见奇迹…此乃命运使然……」
t_en: "One person alone may witness the miracle... Such is the will of fate..."

t_ch: 这个人…必须是你……
t_en: That person... can only be... you.

t_ch: 终于，翁法罗斯的命运开始转动了。如我所言，您的到来会改变一切。
t_en: At last, Amphoreus's fate has begun to shift. Just as I foretold, your arrival will change everything.

t_ch: 毕竟，您也沐浴过<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>的瞥视，能唤醒男人心中，沉睡已久的本能……
t_en: After all, you've also been bathed in <color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon's gaze</color>, which can awaken the long-dormant instinct inside a man...

t_ch: 就像先前提到的那柄「权杖」，也是在<color=#dbc291ff>同一位星神</color>的注视下，才重获新生。
t_en: Much like that Scepter we spoke of earlier... It was only under <color=#dbc291ff>the same Aeon's glance</color> that it was reborn.

t_ch: 呵呵，没错。如果您还记得，我在戏剧开幕时提起过它，那遭受星神抛弃的，本属于「智识」的天体神经元……
t_en: Heh... that's right. If you recall, I mentioned it at the very start of our play: the Celestial-Body Neuron, once belonging to the Erudition, abandoned by the Aeon...

t_ch: 现在，让我为您揭开最后的谜底吧。
t_en: Now, allow me to reveal the final piece of the puzzle for you.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>名为「翁法罗斯」的永恒之地，正是那台权杖漫长而孤独的演算——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land known as "Amphoreus" is nothing more than the Scepter's endless, lonely extrapolation...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是它对遗弃自身的神明，深不见底的怒火啊！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A bottomless well of fury, aimed at the god who cast it aside!</color>

t_ch: 白厄……
t_en: Phainon...

t_ch: 我们是为了回应世界的愿望而启程的，对吧？
t_en: We set out on this journey to answer the world's desire, didn't we?

t_ch: 每一位黄金裔都是如此，从未改变。
t_en: That's what it means to be a Chrysos Heir. So has it always been.

t_ch: 那，为什么……
t_en: Then why...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
t_en: ...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?

t_ch: 明明在每一个正确的时间点，大家已经尽己所能，做出了最正确的选择。
t_en: We made the best choices we could, whenever we could!

t_ch: 可到头来，指引我们的神谕，吞没世界的黑潮……
t_en: But in the end... the prophecy that led us... this black tide swallowing everything...

t_ch: 为什么，是这种样子呢？
t_en: Why does it look like this?

t_ch: 你…也能看见吗？
t_en: You see it, too?

t_ch: 那些焦痕…闪烁的几何…根本不是什么潮水……
t_en: Those burn marks... The flickering cubes... They're not a tide at all...

t_ch: 它就像是…一面破碎的{RUBY_B#屏幕}石版{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: They're more like... a shattered {RUBY_B#screen}teleslate{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 站在这里，泰坦的声音前所未有地清晰，原来它们……
t_en: Standing here, the voices of Titans have never been clearer. Turns out...

t_ch: 是从黑潮中传来的啊……
t_en: They were coming from the black tide all along.

t_ch: 那是「翁法罗斯」在哭泣吗？
t_en: Is that Amphoreus crying?

t_ch: 也许，是它在怒吼吧。向着它的造物主，它的神明。
t_en: Or maybe... it is screaming. At its creator. At its god.

t_ch: 白厄，你还记得吗？小时候，我做过一个梦：梦里是个昏暗、冰冷的小房间，只有欧洛尼斯的帷幕在闪闪发光，就像晶莹的水晶……
t_en: Phainon, do you still remember when I was little, I had a dream: A dark, cold room, with nothing but Oronyx's curtain glowing like crystal...

t_ch: 它的帷幕仿佛能装下整个翁法罗斯，光怪陆离的戏剧在其中上演……
t_en: The curtain seemed to contain all of Amphoreus, where strange and fantastic dramas played out within...

t_ch: 里面有无数个我们，来自无数个不同的世界。
t_en: There were countless versions of us, from countless different worlds.

t_ch: 那或许不是梦。
t_en: Perhaps, it wasn't a dream.

t_ch: 是呀。看着眼前的世界，悲伤的念头还是化作了现实……
t_en: Yeah. As I gaze at the world before me, those sorrowful thoughts have become reality...

t_ch: 原来这才是天空被封闭的原因，翁法罗斯也只是更大的哀丽秘榭……
t_en: So, this is the reason the sky was sealed. Amphoreus is merely a larger Aedes Elysiae...

t_ch: 我们只是这{RUBY_B#实验场}小小世界{RUBY_E#}的戏中人，沿着{RUBY_B#程序}神谕{RUBY_E#}的指引，一遍又一遍踏上相同的{RUBY_B#演算}旅程{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: We are just characters in this {RUBY_B#laboratory}tiny world{RUBY_E#}, following the {RUBY_B#program}prophecy{RUBY_E#}, stepping onto the same {RUBY_B#extrapolation}journey{RUBY_E#} over and over...

t_ch: 那所谓的「再创世」…究竟是什么？
t_en: What, then, is this so-called "Era Nova"?

t_ch: 看着这一切的观众，又在期待什么呢？
t_en: And what are the spectators, watching all of this, truly hoping for?

t_ch: 呵呵，作为抵达世界尽头的回报，就由我来为二位解惑吧。
t_en: Heh, as a reward for reaching the end of the world, let me answer your questions.

t_ch: 以神礼观众之名，我见到——
t_en: As the Theoros, I have observed...

t_ch: 最后一次「再创世」 永劫回归开始前
t_en: Final "Era Nova," before the Eternal Recurrence begins.

t_ch: ——「生命的第一因」，于斯合题。
t_en: Thus, is the synthesis of the "prime mover of life" formed.

t_ch: 这是值得为宇宙铭记的一刻。千万次演算过后，名为「翁法罗斯」的实验场，终于迎来了成果。
t_en: This is a moment the universe will remember. After millions of extrapolations, the experimental environment known as "Amphoreus" has finally achieved results.

t_ch: 你口中的「成果」，就是这一片狼藉的世界？
t_en: So, the "results" you speak of... are this wreckage of a world?

t_ch: 我们拼尽一切，归还十二枚火种再造天地，换来的结局……
t_en: We all gave everything we had, returning twelve Coreflames to recreate the world... and in return...

t_ch: 就是在世界尽头，成为供奉给<color=#dbc291ff>它</color>的祭品？
t_en: We become nothing more than sacrificial offerings at the end of everything?

t_ch: 没错。泰坦是过去的黄金裔，黄金裔是未来的泰坦——阿那克萨戈拉斯对「再创世」的推演基本属实。作为「理性」的模型，他达到了前所未有的高度。
t_en: Exactly. The Titans are Chrysos Heirs of the past, and Chrysos Heirs are the Titans of the future — Anaxagoras's theory of "Era Nova" holds true. As the model of "Reason," he reached unprecedented heights.

t_ch: 只是，仅以戏中人的视角，他终究无法揭开最后一层本质。
t_en: But, from just the perspective of a player in the drama, he could never fully uncover the last layer of truth.

t_ch: 名为「英雄之旅」的进程循环至今，既不是为了「新世界」，也不是为了创造出完美的英雄或神明——
t_en: The cycles of the "Hero's Journey" that have played out until now were never about creating a new world or perfect heroes and gods—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而是一场献给黑潮的「深度学习」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>They were a deep-learning program made for the black tide.</color>

t_ch: 但这一次，你的阴谋要落空了。我已接过刻法勒的火种，等到新世界的黎明升起，火光将烧尽所有的黑暗。
t_en: But this time, your plot will fail. I've taken Kephale's Coreflame, and when the dawn of the new world arrives, its light will burn away all the darkness.

t_ch: 是我的解释不够清晰么？黄金裔和泰坦，都只是实验的附属。你们一路走来，早已知晓这世界演进的过程，见证黑潮是如何诞生、成长，最终席卷万物，摧毁一切——
t_en: Haven't I made myself clear? The Chrysos Heirs and Titans were merely byproducts of the experiment. You've seen this world's evolution, witnessed the birth and growth of the black tide, and how it devoured everything—

t_ch: 一代代英雄、神明、世界，都是为了被它「毁灭」而生。
t_en: Every generation of heroes, gods, and worlds was born only to be destroyed by it.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这便是翁法罗斯计算的终点，一道完美的「毁灭」方程式。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This is the endpoint of Amphoreus's calculations: a perfect equation of Destruction.</color>

t_ch: 在你眼中，所有牺牲的人，都只是一串渺小的数字吗？
t_en: So in your eyes, all the sacrifices are just a string of insignificant numbers?

t_ch: 不必妄自菲薄。比起数字，我更愿意将你们比作「柴薪」。若无薪火，便没有明日的朝阳。
t_en: Don't sell yourselves short. I'd say, rather than numbers, you're more like "fuel for the fire." And without fire, there can be no sunrise tomorrow.

t_ch: 即便那太阳，是从破灭中诞生？
t_en: Even if that sunrise is born from annihilation?

t_ch: 呵呵，奇怪的问题。你可曾想过，在千万次演算中，翁法罗斯已然踏上不同于「智识」的另一条命途。它也早已将神明的赐福，平等地分给了每个孩子……
t_en: Heh, curious question. Have you ever considered that, after millions of extrapolations, Amphoreus is already following a different Path from the Erudition? It has long since granted divine blessings equally to each child...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那就是诸位体内流淌的金血，它源自与「毁灭」同名的负创神。翁法罗斯的黄金裔，从最初就是星神燃烧宇宙的柴薪啊。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The golden blood flowing in your veins... It comes from The Blemished One, whose name is "Destruction" itself. And Amphoreus's Chrysos Heirs were, from the very beginning, fuel for the Aeon to burn the universe.</color>

t_ch: 翁法罗斯已经等待了这一刻太久。在空虚、冰冷而孤独的演算尽头——「毁灭」抵达了终点。
t_en: Amphoreus has waited for this moment for too long. At the end of the empty, cold, and lonely extrapolations — the Destruction has reached its final destination.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#白厄}「NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Phainon}"NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>."{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: {RUBY_B#昔涟}「PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>」{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Cyrene}"PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>."{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: 无需感到遗憾，这一代「黄金裔」是最为杰出的模型，两位是最后的因子。对于你们，再创世绝非谎言，只需踏上前来，拥抱黑潮，接受星神的瞥视。
t_en: No need to feel regret. This generation of Chrysos Heirs is the most outstanding model, and you two are the final factors. For you, the Era Nova is no lie. Just step forward, embrace the black tide, and accept the Aeon's gaze.

t_ch: 你们将从一串冰冷的数字，升格为真正的生命，与所有逝去的存在一同，奔向现实宇宙，完成翁法罗斯的夙愿——
t_en: You will come to life from a string of cold numbers. Along with all those who have passed, you will run toward the real universe, fulfilling Amphoreus's long-held wish—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>以绝灭大君「铁墓」之名，倾泻它的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮</color>}怒火{RUBY_E#}，摧毁{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」博识尊</color>}这一切悲剧的源头{RUBY_E#}！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the Lord Ravager Irontomb, unleash its {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>black tide</color>}fury{RUBY_E#} and destroy {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Nous the Erudition</color>}the source of all this tragedy{RUBY_E#}!</color>

t_ch: …或者，我们还有一个选择。
t_en: ...Or, we could always choose another option.

t_ch: 就像你说的，翁法罗斯只是一场实验，我们是局中人，只能沿着既定的轨迹，走向被星星注视的结局……
t_en: Like you said, Amphoreus is just an experiment, and we're the participants. We can only walk along the predetermined path toward the ending under the watchful eyes of the stars...

t_ch: 但那也意味着，会向翁法罗斯投来瞥视的「星神」，肯定不止一位吧？
t_en: But that also means that there isn't just one Aeon who can cast THEIR glance at Amphoreus, right?

t_ch: 哎呀，这个问题很难回答吗？还是说我猜对了，实际上……
t_en: Heh, is this question really that hard to answer? Or did I guess it right? And in reality...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这个世界早就在其他星神的视线中了？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This world has already been under the watch of other Aeons?</color>

t_ch: 因为怎么想都很奇怪嘛。明明只要冷眼旁观，看着我们完成仪式，被黑潮吞噬，你的目的自然就能达成。
t_en: It's strange when you think about it. If you just stayed back, watching us complete the ritual and get consumed by the black tide, your goal would naturally be achieved.

t_ch: 何必多此一举，向我们解释这么多呢？
t_en: Why go through the trouble of explaining all this to us?

t_ch: 你故作姿态，将所谓的「真相」全盘托出，不过是为了欺瞒我们，掩盖另一种可能……
t_en: You're pretending, revealing the so-called truth just to deceive us, covering up another possibility...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的命运，不止「毁灭」一种结局。
t_en: Destruction is not the only outcome for the fate of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 二位想以「半神」这卑微的身份，改写被群星写定的结局？
t_en: Do you two really think, as petty little "demigods," you can change the outcome written by the stars?

t_ch: 你们凭什么觉得自己能做到？
t_en: What makes you think you're capable of doing that?

t_ch: 嗯…一点小小的勇气和决心？开玩笑的，其实答案很简单啦——
t_en: Hmm... A little courage and determination? Just kidding, the answer is pretty simple—

t_ch: 不过，我们可不打算告诉你♪
t_en: But, we're not gonna tell ya ♪

t_ch: 我们要给「翁法罗斯」编织一场长长的梦，让它相信实验仍未结束，一切仍在继续……
t_en: We're going to weave a long dream for Amphoreus, making it believe the experiment hasn't ended, that everything is still ongoing...

t_ch: 以欧洛尼斯的力量，应该无论如何都无法做到吧。
t_en: With just Oronyx's power, though, it should be impossible to achieve this, right?

t_ch: 是啊。所以，我只能寄希望于童年的那场梦……
t_en: Yeah. So, I can only place my hopes on that childhood dream...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>在那梦里出现的，欧洛尼斯背后的神明。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And the god behind Oronyx that appeared in that dream.</color>

t_ch: 现在，我能够确信：「岁月」就是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>{RUBY_E#}记录翁法罗斯的书页。如果它从世上消失，它铭记的一切在星空中佚失，那位「星神」一定会将视线投向这里……
t_en: Now, I can say with certainty: "Time" is the page on which {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon</color>{RUBY_E#} records Amphoreus. If it fades from existence and all that it records is lost among the stars, that Aeon will surely direct THEIR gaze here...

t_ch: 那会是一道跨越时空的瞥视，它将让今后的每一个我都能够化作你重置岁月的力量——将我的灵魂注入这柄仪式剑，创造一场{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>永不完成的「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>永不终结的逐火之旅</color>{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: And it will be a glance that spans time and space, transforming each incarnation of me into the power you shall wield to reset time — imbuing my soul into this ceremonial blade, and creating an {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>unending Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>endless Flame-Chase Journey</color>{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 我明白。就让我踏入轮回，延续翁法罗斯的计算…欺骗众神，欺骗这个世界。
t_en: I understand. Then let me step into the cycles and continue Amphoreus's grand design: to deceive the gods, deceive the world itself.

t_ch: 但，要让「岁月」从世上消失，也就意味着，你……
t_en: But to make "Time" vanish from this world, that would mean you...

t_ch: 好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。
t_en: Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy.

t_ch: 我们将要踏上的，可是真正的英雄之旅呀。所以……
t_en: What we're about to embark on is the true Hero's Journey. So...

t_ch: 笑一笑，好吗？
t_en: C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?

t_ch: 在那「记忆」中，你一定会再次遇见我。那个一无所知的小昔涟会躺在软软的草堆上，吹着轻快的风，憧憬着远方的世界。
t_en: In that "memory," you will definitely meet me again. The little Cyrene who knew nothing, lying on a soft patch of grass, feeling the light breeze, dreaming of the distant world.

t_ch: 把逐火之旅讲给她听吧，然后…让她也成为这故事中浪漫的一笔。
t_en: Tell her about the Flame-Chase Journey, and then... let her become a romantic part of this story.

t_ch: 我相信，未来的每一个她都会做出和我同样的选择：无数次抹除「岁月」，无数次重置时间——毕竟她们都是我呀，而人家的魅力就是始终如一。
t_en: I believe every Cyrene will make the same choice - erasing "Time" again and again, resetting time over and over. After all, they're all me, and I will always have my charm.

t_ch: 然后，我就会沉入甜甜的梦乡，消失在世界的小角落里……
t_en: Then, I'll fall into a sweet dream, disappearing in some small corner of the world...

t_ch: 静静地，等待下一页被翻开的那天。
t_en: Quietly, waiting for the day when that next page is turned.

t_ch: 而我会继续走下去。即便前路是一片黑暗，我也会燃烧自我将其照亮。
t_en: And I will keep going. Even if the road ahead is dark, I will burn myself to light the way.

t_ch: 与其让火种沦为黑潮的给养，不如由我来成为它们的容器，阻止「再创世」到来。哪怕要燃尽这肉体也无妨，只要我不曾熄灭，逐火就不会终结……
t_en: Rather than let the Coreflames become nourishment for the black tide, I'll become their vessel, to prevent the arrival of Era Nova. Even if I have to burn through my own body, it's no matter. As long as I don't extinguish, the Flame-Chase will never end...

t_ch: 直到翁法罗斯，迎来真正的黎明。
t_en: Until Amphoreus welcomes a true dawn.

t_ch: 守望岁月的少女，和背负世界的战士……
t_en: The girl who watches over time, and the warrior who carries the world...

t_ch: 现在，就让我们履行「岁月」和「负世」的使命……
t_en: Now, let us fulfill the duties of "Time" and "Worldbearing"...

t_ch: 继往，开来吧。
t_en: Honor the past, and forge ahead.

t_ch: 我向你保证，痛苦…转瞬即逝。
t_en: I promise you, the pain... will pass in the blink of an eye.

t_ch: 你要握紧这柄仪式剑。在我离去后，它会把你送回时间的起点，一段新故事的开篇。
t_en: You need to hold tight to this ceremonial blade. After I'm gone, it will take you back to the beginning of time, the start of a new story.

t_ch: 我相信，在那段故事里，又或者无数段相似而不相同的故事之后，大家…所有牺牲的伙伴，都能和我们儿时憧憬的「救世主」一起，在更辽阔的星空下相聚。
t_en: I believe that in that story, or in countless stories, each alike yet unique, everyone... all the companions who sacrificed themselves, alongside the Deliverer we once dreamed of as children, will reunite beneath a vast, endless sky.

t_ch: …倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
t_en: ...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

t_ch: 所以，我们该启程啦，成为开启一切的人……
t_en: So, let's set out. We will be the ones to start everything...

t_ch: 就像你的名字那样，背负起最初的混沌，和这个我们深爱的世界吧……
t_en: Carry the primordial chaos, just as your name suggests, and bear this world we hold so dear...

t_ch: 再见啦，卡厄斯兰那。
t_en: So long, Khaslana.

t_ch: …伙伴。
t_en: ...Friend.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭，儿时的小村庄，微风和涛声依旧。
t_en: Aedes Elysiae, the little village of my childhood. The gentle breeze and the sound of waves still linger.

t_ch: 一切如常。很高兴，最后还能回望它一眼。
t_en: Everything is as it was. It feels good to take one last look.

t_ch: 你知道，这里只是记忆的一角，真正的哀丽秘榭……
t_en: You know, this is just a corner of the memory. The real Aedes Elysiae...

t_ch: 我知道。
t_en: I know.

t_ch: 我是来道别的。或许，我们不会再见了。
t_en: I'm here to say goodbye. We might not see each other again.

t_ch: 你可以一直留在这里，时间会为你停滞。
t_en: You can stay here forever, and time will stand still for you.

t_ch: 让它流淌起来吧。我该出发了。
t_en: Let it flow. It's time for me to go.

t_ch: 即便那是一条无法回头的路？
t_en: Even if it's a path with no turning back?

t_ch: 我们何时有过回头的选择？
t_en: When have we ever had the luxury of turning back?

t_ch: …你害怕了吗？在了解到自己的本源后……
t_en: ...Are you afraid? After learning the truth of your origins...

t_ch: 你会将「我」给予你的动力，视作「毁灭」蛊惑人心的低语吗？
t_en: Will you see the motivation "I" gave you as the manipulating whispers of Destruction?

t_ch: 那些源自本心的坚持和选择，我不相信它们是所谓「命途」的设计……
t_en: The convictions and choices that come from my heart... I don't believe they're designed by the so-called "Paths"...

t_ch: 若我们生来只是一串模拟生命的数字，那你就是我所憧憬的形象，想要成为的样子。
t_en: If we are just numbers simulating life, then you are the image I've always longed for, the person I wish to become.

t_ch: 一个真实的、活生生的人。一个真正的「英雄」。
t_en: A real, living person. A true hero.

t_ch: 那又何必在这里作别？你可以带上我，一同启程。我会陪伴在你左右，给你指引，一如既往。
t_en: Then why do we part here? You can take me with you, and we can start this journey together. I'll be by your side, guiding you, just like before.

t_ch: 不。恐怕，我只能独自上路了。
t_en: No. I'm afraid I'm on my own this time.

t_ch: 为什么？
t_en: Why?

t_ch: 因为这世上不存在两全其美。昔涟已经拥抱了她的命运……
t_en: Because there is no perfect solution in this world. Cyrene has already embraced her fate...

t_ch: 而我，也会投身自己的本源——「毁灭」——以这力量反抗它的造主，为席卷世间的黑暗，带去无尽的怒火。
t_en: And I will embrace my origin — Destruction — and with this power, I will rebel against its creator, bringing endless fury to the darkness sweeping the world.

t_ch: 你若陪在我身边，我会踟蹰…但这个世界已容不下一个优柔寡断的士兵。
t_en: If you stay by my side, I'll hesitate... but this world can't afford a soldier who wavers.

t_ch: 还记得么？小时候，孩子们要是抽到「君王」或「勇士」就欢呼雀跃，抽到「魔人」或者「酒鬼」就嚷嚷着这次不算，再来一次……
t_en: Do you still remember when we were kids, everyone would get so excited drawing cards like "Ruler" or "Warrior," but throw fits over "Devil" or "Drunkard" and demand a redo...

t_ch: 想反悔就反悔，孩子们总是幸福的……
t_en: Kids always get to change their minds. Things are so happy and simple for them...

t_ch: 可属于大人的命运，从来没有回头的选择。
t_en: But when it comes to the fate of adults, there's no room for redos.

t_ch: 那就去吧，卡厄斯兰那。如你约定的那般：欺骗世界，夺得火种，扭转命运……
t_en: Then go, Khaslana, as you promised: Deceive the world, seize the Coreflames, and rewrite fate...

t_ch: 奋力地燃烧自己，以徒劳为剑，反抗神明吧——
t_en: Burn yourself up with all your might, wield your futility like a sword, and fight against the gods—

t_ch: 以「负世」之名，我向你保证……
t_en: In the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you...

t_ch: 刻法勒永志不忘。
t_en: Kephale will never forget this.

t_ch: 于是，时间向我身后退去。
t_en: So, time retreated behind me.

t_ch: 直至万物都不曾存在的起源。
t_en: Until it reached the origin, where nothing ever existed.

t_ch: 诚如那刻夏老师所说，在那一片虚空中，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}立于混沌的中心，时间、空间和因果，都从它的身躯中流溢而出……
t_en: Just as Professor Anaxa once said, in that void, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} stood at the center of chaos. Time, space, and causality all flowed from their body...

t_ch: 当岁月的浪潮终于平息，已是光历<unbreak>3870</unbreak>年。
t_en: When the waves of time finally calmed, it was the year <unbreak>3870</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.

t_ch: 黄金战争已持续近一个世纪。黑潮的威胁愈演愈烈，势不可挡。
t_en: The Chrysos War had lasted for nearly a century. And the threat of the black tide was growing stronger and more relentless.

t_ch: 那是「阳雷骑士」剑指天空的时代。她没能摘得火种，却印证了预言——凡人也能够弑杀神明。
t_en: That was the era of the Daythunder Knight's battle with the Sky. While she could not seize the Coreflame, she proved that the prophecy was true — that mortals could slay gods.

t_ch: 自此，旧王朝的孑遗，<color=#dbc291ff>「凯撒」刻律德菈</color>向天下号令，召集各邦黄金裔英雄，向泰坦宣战——
t_en: From that moment, the sole survivor of the old dynasty, <color=#dbc291ff>Imperator Cerydra</color>, issued a call to arms across the lands, summoning heroic Chrysos Heirs to wage war on the Titans—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那便是尘封于历史中，以失败告终的…第一次逐火之旅。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And that was the first, doomed Flame-Chase Journey, sealed away in history.</color>

t_ch: 第 1 次永劫回归
t_en: The 1st Eternal Recurrence

t_ch: 所以，你的意思是：你在时间中溯洄而上，行至未曾抵达的这片海床，只为告诉我们——
t_en: So, what you're saying is: You've traveled back down the river of time, finally reaching this untouched seabed, just to tell us—

t_ch: 逐火之旅，乃至整个翁法罗斯，都不过是「星神」梦中的泡影？
t_en: The Flame-Chase Journey, and even all of Amphoreus, are nothing but illusions in an Aeon's dreams?

t_ch: 没错。所以，剑旗爵，请引领我觐见刻律德菈陛下吧，我有义务将真相如实相告。
t_en: Exactly. So, Dux Gladiorum, please take me to meet Her Majesty Cerydra. I must share the truth with her.

t_ch: 既然陛下不在，不必多礼了。「剑旗」二字总会让我想起那葬身渊下的故国……
t_en: Since Her Majesty is not here, no need for formalities. The word "Gladiorum" always reminds me of my fallen homeland buried deep in the depths...

t_ch: 还是叫我<color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音</color>吧，无名剑士。
t_en: Call me <color=#dbc291ff>Hysilens</color>, nameless swordmaster.

t_ch: 容我多嘴一句，您早已知晓我的姓名了。
t_en: Please allow me to add one more thing. You actually already know my name.

t_ch: 你说「白厄」吗？这种名字怎么可能是本名……
t_en: You mean Phainon? Such a name could never be your true one...

t_ch: 但我不会追根究底。自陛下颁布逐火号令，世间英雄纷纷递来投名状，其中多一名「白厄」或「黑厄」又何妨？
t_en: But I won't question you further about it. Ever since Her Majesty issued the Flame-Chase decree, heroes from all over have sent their letters of introduction. What's the harm in adding one more name like Phainon or Pie-non?

t_ch: 况且，深海无光，不正适合藏起那些不便示人的秘密么？
t_en: Besides, the deep sea is dark. Isn't it the perfect place to hide secrets best left unseen?

t_ch: 好了，无名剑士。挽住我的尾流，换个地方说话吧。
t_en: Alright, nameless swordmaster. Hold onto my wake. Let's find somewhere else to talk.

t_ch: 您对我所说的，难道就不抱一丝质疑？
t_en: Aren't you even a little suspicious of what I've said?

t_ch: 质疑并非我分内之事……
t_en: Harboring suspicions is not my concern...

t_ch: 我手中的剑只为凯撒的疑心起舞。多说无益，请你用实际行动证明自己吧。
t_en: My sword dances only when the Imperator harbors doubts. There's no use in speaking further. Show me your true intentions through action.

t_ch: 水流到此为止，你寻找的人，就在这之后了。
t_en: The waters end here. The one you seek is beyond this point.

t_ch: 刻律德菈陛下，终于要面见本尊了。
t_en: At last, I can meet with Her Majesty Cerydra herself.

t_ch: 有什么需要注意的礼节么？
t_en: Are there any formalities I need to observe?

t_ch: 别屈膝，别行旧王朝的吻手和吻脚礼，更别跪拜——凯撒厌恶繁文缛节——更厌恶比她高的人头颅低过她的皇冠。
t_en: Don't kneel, don't do the hand-kissing or foot-kissing gestures of the old dynasty, and most of all, don't bow — the Imperator despises such rituals — especially when the heads of those taller than her bend beneath her crown.

t_ch: 哈，还真是…平易近人。
t_en: Ha, she really is... down-to-earth.

t_ch: 这就是第二件要注意的事了：非亲信不得近身。在凯撒同意前，请保持五步之遥。
t_en: The second thing to note: Only trusted ones may come near her. Keep five paces distance until the Imperator allows otherwise.

t_ch: 这听起来倒像我另一位故人。
t_en: Sounds like an old friend of mine.

t_ch: 有经验就好。机灵些，你会安然无恙的。
t_en: Well, experience is a good thing. Stay sharp, and you'll be just fine.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#阿格莱雅}金织爵{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#缇宝}质子{RUBY_E#}，久等了。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Aglaea}Dux Goldweaver{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Tribbie}little hostage{RUBY_E#}. Apologies for keeping you waiting.

t_ch: 是你们……
t_en: It's you...

t_ch: 你认识她们？那就好说了。
t_en: You know them? Good, that makes things easier.

t_ch: 在那之前，我更好奇另一件事：刻律德菈陛下，她人在哪里？
t_en: Before that, I'm more curious about one thing: Where is Her Majesty Cerydra?

t_ch: 以免你误会，无名剑士：虽然这一路有说有笑，但我可从没说过你有权利觐见她。
t_en: To avoid any misunderstandings, nameless swordmaster: Although we spoke and laughed along the way, I never said you were entitled to meet her.

t_ch: 凯撒有令：「『救世主』绝不会在这个时代出现，须留心可疑之人」。
t_en: The Imperator decreed: "The 'Deliverer' will not appear in this age. Be wary of suspicious individuals."

t_ch: 来吧，两位，做我们该做的事。
t_en: Come now, both of you, let's finish our job.

t_ch: 啊…原来是个圈套。
t_en: Ah... I see, it's a trap.

t_ch: 我本无意争锋。所以，请记住，海瑟音阁下：如果我的剑因为恻隐而变得迟钝……
t_en: I had no intention of fighting. So, remember this, Lady Hysilens: If my sword shows any hesitation...

t_ch: 别感谢我——去感谢她们吧。
t_en: Don't thank me — thank them instead.

t_ch: 不，你误会了。
t_en: No, you misunderstand.

t_ch: *我们*不想看见黄金裔伤害彼此。只需一些时间，让*我们*问你几个问题。
t_en: We don't want to see Chrysos Heirs hurt each other. Just give us some time to ask you a few questions.

t_ch: 然后，墨涅塔的「金丝」会做出裁断，宣判你的命运。
t_en: Then, Mnestia's "golden threads" will judge you and decide your fate.

t_ch: …悉听尊便。
t_en: ...As you wish.

t_ch: 白发的剑士，如果你所说不假，那你一定对世界的命运了若指掌——
t_en: White-haired swordmaster, if what you say is true, then you must know the fate of the world...

t_ch: 那么，*我们*从神谕中读到的预言，你知晓多少呢？
t_en: So, how much do you know about what we read from the prophecy?

t_ch: 说出缇宝的预言。
t_en: Speak of Tribbie's prophecy.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither in the soil of foreign lands."</color>

t_ch: …对吗，缇宝老师？
t_en: ...Is that correct, Lady Tribbie?
How...

t_ch: 怎么可能……
t_en: How is this possible...?

t_ch: 他说对了？
t_en: He got it right?

t_ch: 是啊。可预言从未提及他的出现，至少…不属于这个时代。
t_en: Yes. But the prophecy never mentioned that he'd appear here. At least, not in this era.

t_ch: 你们必须听我说，阿格莱雅，缇宝老师：此世的「白厄」尚未诞生。在遥远的未来，他会遵从神谕指引，出现在你们面前——
t_en: You must listen to me, Aglaea, Tribbie. The Phainon of this world has not yet been born. In a distant future, he will follow the prophecy's guidance and appear before you—

t_ch: 但，不要去找他——因为「再创世」是一场彻头彻尾的骗局。
t_en: But do not seek him out — because "Era Nova" is a complete and utter lie.

t_ch: 我会将一切如实相告，你们也一定能明白：为何世人必须放弃神谕，找到另一条「再创世」的道路……
t_en: I will tell you the truth, and you will understand why the world must forsake the prophecy and find another path to "Era Nova"...

t_ch: 因为我相信：无论历史的进程如何改变，我认识的你们——
t_en: Because I know both of you, and I believe that no matter how the course of history may change...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我们所有人的信念，必定始终如一。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The faith we all share will always remain the same.</color>

t_ch: 于是，岩层开始倒转，历史重新罗织。
t_en: And so, the layers of rock began to reverse, and history wove itself anew.

t_ch: 在故人引荐下，我得见逐火之旅的领导者，刻律德菈。一场艰难而漫长的谈判后，我们达成共识——
t_en: Through my old acquaintances, I was given the chance to meet the leader of the Flame-Chase Journey, Cerydra. And after a long and arduous negotiation, we came to an agreement—

t_ch: 凯撒的同盟需要「毁灭」，我愿意倾尽全力。而逐火的战利品——火种——都将为我封印。
t_en: The Imperator's alliance needed the Destruction, and I was ready to pour all my strength into it. The spoils of the Flame-Chase — the Coreflames — would be sealed by my hand.

t_ch: 前提是：在即将到来的下一场战役，对「大地」的征伐中……
t_en: But the condition was this: In the upcoming battle, in our conquest of the "Earth"...

t_ch: 我能证明，自己的力量足以超越命运。
t_en: I had to prove that my power could transcend fate.

t_ch: 在原本的历史中，那是一场惨烈的战争。最终，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属「荒笛」弑杀发狂的泰坦，接过支撑大地的火种。
t_en: In the original history, it was a brutal war. At the end, the Titankin of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, Terravox, killed the rampaging Titan and took the Coreflame that supported the earth.

t_ch: 但这一次，翁法罗斯迎来了命运的转折。
t_en: But this time, Amphoreus encountered a turning point in its fate.

t_ch: 双方未有一人牺牲。当我斩下巨神头颅，将火种高高举起，众人围绕那具被金血焚灭的神骸，欢声雷动——
t_en: Neither side suffered any losses. When I severed the Titan's head and raised the Coreflame high, the crowd gathered around the scorched remains of the god, roaring with joy...

t_ch: ——欢呼「毁灭」的英雄，初次点燃生命的微光。
t_en: Cheering for the hero of the Destruction, who had ignited the faint spark of life for the first time.

t_ch: 是啊，在摇曳的微光中，原本晦暗的前路仿佛也变得有迹可循。
t_en: Yes, in that flickering light, the once-dark path ahead seemed to become clearer.

t_ch: 我证明了自己，也在随后的漫长时间里，为其余泰坦一一带去陨落。
t_en: I proved myself, and in the long years that followed, I brought down the other Titans, one by one.

t_ch: 我能做的不止有「等待」，当时间回到原点，改变世界的契机，也会从历史的字里行间浮现……
t_en: I could do more than just wait. When time resets, the chance to change the world also emerges from the lines of history...

t_ch: 直到，逆转「再创世」揭示的残酷未来。
t_en: Until, finally, the brutal future revealed by "Era Nova" is reversed.

t_ch: 可是，告诉我……
t_en: But tell me...

t_ch: 若当真如此，我们又为何会步入相同的结局？
t_en: If that's truly the case, why are we doomed to the same outcome?

t_ch: 第 1 次永劫回归 尽头
t_en: The 1st Eternal Recurrence: End

t_ch: 人们遵守约定，让你接过了所有的火种。这一世，在缇里西庇俄丝之后，翁法罗斯没有一名半神诞生。
t_en: The people kept their promise and handed you all the Coreflames. In this world, after Tribios, no demigods were born in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 事已至此，我只想知道，当他们以凡人的身躯在黑潮中消散时……
t_en: At this point, I just want to know. When they vanished into the black tide with their mortal bodies...

t_ch: 你为何连一滴眼泪都没有流下？
t_en: Why didn't you shed even a single tear?

t_ch: 你的冷漠令我心寒。他们对你而言，只是一堆无足轻重的注脚？
t_en: Your indifference chills me. To you, were they just a bunch of insignificant footnotes?

t_ch: 我的悲伤从未消逝。恰恰相反，十二枚火种加诸此身，令我心中的火焰前所未有地暴烈……
t_en: Sorrow has been my constant companion. In fact, with twelve Coreflames upon me, the fire in my heart has never been more violent...

t_ch: 我以「愤怒」铭记此世的全部。只要我还在燃烧，他们就从未离去。
t_en: I'll remember this world through anger. As long as I burn, they'll never truly leave me.

t_ch: 或许，已经太晚了。
t_en: Perhaps... it's already too late.

t_ch: 但你说得对。愤怒，此时此刻，它是我唯一能仰仗的武器。所以……
t_en: But you're right. Anger, at this moment, is the only weapon I can rely on. So...

t_ch: ——拔剑吧，刽子手！我会让你知道，你最大的错误，就是留下了我！
t_en: Draw your sword, executioner! I'll make sure you realize that your greatest mistake was leaving me alive!

t_ch: 在那之后，他举剑袭来……
t_en: After that, he raised his sword and attacked...

t_ch: 然后，卡厄斯兰那杀死了自己。
t_en: Then, Khaslana killed himself.

t_ch: 那一天，是谁倒在剑下，留在过去；又是谁前往未来，我已经记不清了。
t_en: That day, who fell to the sword to be left in the past, and who went into the future? I can't remember anymore.

t_ch: 我只记得一只若虫，它藏在余光尚不能及的阴影中，徒劳地推着石球……
t_en: I only remember a nymph, hiding in the shadows just out of sight, futilely pushing a stone ball...

t_ch: 攀上，落下；攀上，落下；攀上，落下……
t_en: Climb, fall, climb, fall, climb again, and fall...

t_ch: 若虫拥有的自由，只在于决定以何种方式推动圆石：时快，时慢，时而停留在一处不那么陡峭的斜坡上，倚靠圆石小憩……
t_en: The only freedom the nymph had was in choosing how to roll the stone: sometimes fast, sometimes slow, sometimes resting on a gentler slope, leaning against the stone for a break...

t_ch: 但它的选择无法改变「徒劳」的本质：圆石总会从斜坡上滚下，若虫也总会回到斜坡的起点，重新开始。
t_en: But its choice couldn't change the futility of it all: the stone would always roll back down the slope, and the nymph would always return to the starting point, beginning again.

t_ch: 那之后，每一个轮回，我行至此地时，燃烧的天空总会为它的行迹投下影子。它会在{RUBY_B#深夜}幕匿时{RUBY_E#}的第四个时刻抵达顶点附近，下一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}的第一个十五秒摔落起点。
t_en: After that, every time I reached this point in the cycle, the burning sky would cast a shadow over its path. It would nearly reach the peak at the fourth quint of {RUBY_B#Midnight}Curtain-Fall Hour{RUBY_E#}, then fall to the starting point in the first fifteen seconds of the next {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 而后，我在这次轮回中的一切努力，也会在同一时间化为泡影。
t_en: And my efforts in this cycle would dissolve into nothing at the same time.

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>134</unbreak> 次永劫回归
t_en: The <unbreak>134</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence

t_ch: 真是天方夜谭啊……
t_en: Absolute nonsense...

t_ch: 我还以为…「轮回」就是你想要的答案。
t_en: I thought... "cycles" was the answer you were looking for.

t_ch: 不，只是这答案来得太过突然，反而少了追根究源的乐趣。
t_en: No, it's just that the answer came so suddenly, there was no fun in tracing it back to its roots.

t_ch: 「星神」？命途？哼，简直不知所谓。
t_en: Aeons? Paths? Hmph, what a load of nonsense.

t_ch: 至于这两个概念，我也没法带给你准确的解释。
t_en: I can't give you an exact explanation of those two concepts either.

t_ch: 够了，我只是在抒发自己的无奈，懂吗？对此我早有预期——「『黑潮』源于天外」，这事也不例外。
t_en: Enough, I'm just expressing my frustration. Don't you understand? I was already expecting this. "The black tide came from beyond the sky," and everything else is no exception.

t_ch: 命运真是奇妙：无论历史的细节怎么变化，我认识的那刻夏总是这么刻薄。
t_en: Fate is a strange thing: no matter how the details of history change, the Anaxa I know always remains as harsh as ever.

t_ch: 哼…如果其他阿那克萨戈拉斯只知对诸神顶礼膜拜，那我一定会想办法跨越轮回，把他们扼杀在摇篮里——
t_en: Hmph... If the other Anaxagorases actually worshiped the gods, I'd make sure to find a way to break the cycles to crush them in their cradles—

t_ch: ——可惜，现在只有你有这个本事。
t_en: Too bad, now only you have the ability to do that.

t_ch: 意思是，你愿意帮忙？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean? You're willing to help?

t_ch: 当然。火种本来就为救世而生，依我看，高贵的泰坦们绝无拒绝的理由……
t_en: Of course. The Coreflames were meant to save the world, and in my opinion, the noble Titans have no reason to refuse...

t_ch: …况且，照你的说法，在踏上这无尽的轮回以前…你可是我的门生啊。
t_en: ...Besides, according to you, before stepping into these endless cycles... you were my pupil.

t_ch: 相同的话…我也听过不下百遍了。
t_en: I've already heard the same thing countless times...

t_ch: 闲话少叙，我们走吧。如果遇到其他学者，交给我来应付。
t_en: Enough chitchat. Let's go. If we run into any other scholars, leave them to me.

t_ch: …慢着。
t_en: ...Hold up.

t_ch: 招子放亮点…有人在监视我们。
t_en: Keep your wits about you... Someone's watching us.

t_ch: 你小子，视力比我想象中要好不少嘛……
t_en: Pretty boy, your eyesight's better than I thought...

t_ch: 至于那个把世界搅得天翻地覆的伪神…就是你吧，白毛小子？
t_en: As for that false god who's been turning the world upside down... it's you, isn't it, white-hair?

t_ch: 哎…你还真爱出风头啊。
t_en: Heh... you sure do love stealing the spotlight.

t_ch: 以七贤人之名，我要求你立刻远离启蒙王座：此地是「理性」至高无上的圣地，容不得任何人亵渎——
t_en: In the name of the Seven Sages, I demand that you immediately step away from the Luminary Throne. This is the sacred ground of "Reason," and no one may desecrate it—

t_ch: ——去把我的原话带给阿格莱雅。同样的话我不会再说第二遍，猫女。
t_en: Take my words back to Aglaea. I won't say the same thing twice, Catgirl.

t_ch: 天哪，你甚至不愿意叫我一声「诡计」的半神！真是太让人伤心了。
t_en: Oh my, you won't even call me the demigod of "Trickery"? That is just heartbreaking.

t_ch: 同样的话也回敬给你：第一，身为全天下最渎神的异端之一，你没资格对我说教；第二……
t_en: I have some words for you too: First, as one of the most heretical blasphemers in the world, you have no right to lecture me. Second...

t_ch: 这事和你无关，树庭男孩。退下吧，我可不想有人受伤哪。
t_en: This is none of your business, Grove boy. Step aside, I don't want anyone getting hurt.

t_ch: 又是…似曾相识的故事啊。
t_en: Here we go... again.

t_ch: 窃火的盗贼…你们真以为，靠虚张声势就能镇住树庭的贤人？
t_en: Coreflame thieves... You really think you can scare off a Sage of the Grove with nothing but empty threats?

t_ch: 桀桀桀…阴沉的小鬼，真是牙尖爪利呀！
t_en: Heh, heh, heh... This gloomy little brat's got a sharp tongue!

t_ch: 不错不错，本大爷很欣赏你。作为回敬，我就当场用这{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种饱餐一顿——
t_en: Not bad, not bad, I kind of like you. As a return favor, I'll feast on {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame right here—

t_ch: 真是如出一辙啊，就像我过去认识的许多个他们……
t_en: They're exactly like all the past ones I've known...

t_ch: 既狡猾…又天真。
t_en: Cunning... and yet so naive.

t_ch: 听起来，你胸有成竹？
t_en: Sounds like you have a plan?

t_ch: 当然。最初踏上逐火之旅时，缇宝老师怎么也教不会我的<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯神迹</color>……
t_en: Of course. When I first set out on the Flame-Chase Journey, Lady Tribbie never managed to teach me <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx's Miracle</color>...

t_ch: …一路走来，我也总算略知一二了。
t_en: ...But along the way, I learned a thing or two.

t_ch: 哼，敬拜学派的愚蠢发明也算是派上用场了。
t_en: Heh, the Venerationists' foolish inventions finally come in handy.

t_ch: 呼哧…呼哧…怎么会这样……
t_en: Huff... Huff... How is this possible?

t_ch: 你来了，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…还是如此准时。
t_en: You've arrived, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... Always so punctual.

t_ch: 什、什么，你知道本大爷…？
t_en: Wh—What? Do you know who I am?

t_ch: 我的耐心已经快用尽了，所以更不想浪费口舌。听好，贼灵：交出火种，就当我们从未交锋过。这样，你们和这个世界都能得到拯救。
t_en: I'm running out of patience, so I'm not going to waste words. Listen up, Spirithief: Hand over the Coreflame, and let's pretend we never clashed. This way, you and this world can still be saved.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，说得比吟游诗人唱得还好听！说什么「拯救」……
t_en: Heh, heh, heh, "save"? You sing better than any bard!

t_ch: 要本大爷说…你自己就是翁法罗斯天大的祸患！
t_en: If you ask me... you're the greatest disaster Amphoreus has ever known!

t_ch: 就算你再怎么厉害，也不过是肉体凡胎罢了！承载十二颗火种？别开玩笑了，你只会被神火吞噬，然后拉这个世界给你当陪葬……
t_en: No matter how strong you are, you're still just a mortal body! Carrying twelve Coreflames? Don't make me laugh! You'll just get consumed by the divine flames, and drag this world down with you...

t_ch: …一百三十四。
t_en: ...One hundred thirty-four.

t_ch: 什么……
t_en: What...

t_ch: 这是我经历的第一百三十四次轮回。已为我所承载的火种数量，是……
t_en: This is the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th cycle I've lived through. And the number of Coreflames I carry is...

t_ch: …一千五百九十六。
t_en: ...<unbreak>1,596</unbreak>.
...Yes.

t_ch: 一千多颗火种，区区一个黄金裔…怎么可能？！
t_en: A thousand Coreflames, and just a single Chrysos Heir... How is that even possible!?

t_ch: 我能一路走到这里，就是证明。
t_en: I've come this far, and that's proof enough.

t_ch: 可总有一天…你会被焚烧殆尽。
t_en: But someday... you will burn to the ground.

t_ch: 当然，神火总有一天会烧毁我的眼球，令我盲目……
t_en: Of course, the divine flames will eventually consume my eyes and blind me...

t_ch: 但在那之前，它们还能为「侵晨」淬火。这样在我剖开你的胃囊时，你就不会感受到痛苦。
t_en: But before that, they could still forge and sharpen Dawnmaker. Now, when I cut open your stomach, you won't feel a thing.

t_ch: 你、你……
t_en: You... you...

t_ch: 这是最后通牒。
t_en: This is the final warning.

t_ch: 桀桀桀…好啊，好啊……
t_en: Heh, heh... Fine, fine...

t_ch: 假设这个世界的未来存在一亿种可能性，不管怎么看，那其中九千九百九十九万九千九百九十九种都指向了「毁灭」的结局……
t_en: Assume this world holds a hundred million possibilities, and no matter how one looks at it, ninety-nine million, nine hundred ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine of them all point to outcomes of certain Destruction...

t_ch: 就算这样，本大爷也会用遭世人唾弃的神力，实现那亿分之一的可能……
t_en: Even so, I'll use my divine power, despised by the people of this world, to achieve that one-in-a-hundred-million possibility...

t_ch: …巴特鲁斯！
t_en: ...Bartholos!

t_ch: 小鬼…你要是真有种，就先跨过本大爷的尸体…！
t_en: Brat... if you've got the guts, you'll have to first step over my dead body!

t_ch: 呵，真是荒唐……
t_en: Heh, how absurd...

t_ch: 在我的记忆里，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}总是在重复自己的结局……
t_en: In my memories, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} always meets the same end, over and over again...

t_ch: 它的离席，已经不会在我心中掀起波澜了。
t_en: Their departure no longer stirs anything in my heart.

t_ch: 眼前这枚「理性」的火种是赝品，一目了然。
t_en: This "Reason" Coreflame before us is a fake, obvious as day.

t_ch: 啊…我知道。
t_en: Ah... I know.

t_ch: 我知道，总会这样。在贼灵的掩护下，「诡计」半神会带着两枚火种逃之夭夭……
t_en: I know. It always plays out like this. The Spirithief covers for her, and the "Trickery" demigod escapes with two Coreflames...

t_ch: …然后，出于不甘，或是仇恨，再度站在我的面前。
t_en: ...And then, driven by defiance, or hatred, she decides to stand before me once more.

t_ch: 就像我过去认识的无数个她们…既狡猾，又天真。
t_en: Exactly like the countless past hers I've known... cunning, yet so naive.

t_ch: 既然同样的情节已经在你眼中上演了无数次，告诉我……
t_en: Since you've witnessed this same scene play out countless times, tell me...

t_ch: 接下来…你会把「诡计」的火种从我胸口剜出来吗？
t_en: Will you carve the "Trickery" Coreflame from my chest now?

t_ch: …这取决于你的态度。至少目前为止，在你问出了这句话的那些轮回里…结局没有那么残忍。
t_en: ...That depends on your attitude. At least so far, in the cycles where you've asked this question... the endings haven't been so cruel.

t_ch: 哼…那还真是谢谢你啊。但我同样相信，这一次你追不上我——
t_en: Heh... well, thank you for that. But I also believe that this time, you won't catch up to me—

t_ch: 没人能追得上我，我早就不再为「逃亡」而奔跑了。
t_en: No one can catch up to me. I'm no longer running to escape anymore.

t_ch: 不论你相信与否，我都会告诉你，这是个错误的决定。
t_en: Whether you believe me or not, I'll still tell you this: You've made the wrong decision.

t_ch: 好啊，那就试试看——
t_en: Alright, then, we'll see—

t_ch: ——肃静。
t_en: Silence.

t_ch: 啊…这倒是头一遭。
t_en: Ah... this is new.

t_ch: …独眼男孩，你这又是唱的哪一出？
t_en: ...One-eyed boy, what are you trying to pull now?

t_ch: 你走吧，赛法利娅。给我们一点私人时间。
t_en: Go, Cifera. Give us some time in private.

t_ch: 这不是为她，而是为你。
t_en: This isn't for her, but for you.

t_ch: 你已经在这条路上走得太远，该讨论一种可能性了：也许你所行的根本不是拯救的道路，只是单纯地把这世界拖入火海而已。
t_en: You've walked too far down this path. It's time to discuss a possibility: Maybe the road you're walking is not one of salvation, but one that will simply drag the world into the flames.

t_ch: 看在你我也曾为师生的份上，回头吧。我不在乎你已经尝试了多少次，因为有一件事我已十分明了——
t_en: For old times' sake, turn back. I don't care how many times you've tried, because there's one thing I'm sure of—

t_ch: 你心底的救世主情结，已将你变得与你口中冷眼的神明并无区别。那些你誓言要拯救的人子…如今在你眼里，他们的性命恐怕与蝼蚁无异吧？
t_en: Your messiah complex has turned you into something no different from the icy gods you spoke of. The children of humanity you swore to save... they are no more than ants to you now, aren't they?

t_ch: 呵，怪不得。
t_en: Heh, of course.

t_ch: 我每天都在想，究竟是什么样的恶魔才能在顷刻间烧毁我的家乡，连眼都不眨一下……
t_en: I've been wondering, what kind of demon could burn my homeland to the ground in an instant, without batting an eye...

t_ch: 现在，我找到答案了。<color=#dbc291ff>原来那浑身着火的恶魔，满脑子幻想的都是要成为「救世主」哪！</color>
t_en: Now, I have the answer. <color=#dbc291ff>It turns out that fiery demon has been fantasizing of becoming this world's Deliverer!</color>

t_ch: 我已经不想再辩解什么了。不管付出多少口舌，结局都不会改变。
t_en: I don't want to argue anymore. No matter what I say, the outcome won't change.

t_ch: 做出你们最大的努力抗争，或是接受命运，将火种交给我……
t_en: Make your biggest effort to resist, or accept fate and hand over the Coreflame to me...

t_ch: 哪怕只是徒劳，你们…我们，都有选择的权利。
t_en: Even if it's futile, you... we all have the right to choose.

t_ch: 没错，纵使这只是「徒劳」，世界不过是一场神明的玩笑……
t_en: Yes, even if it is futile, and the world is just a divine joke...

t_ch: 但当我靠着自己的双腿，踏入被诸神写就的「毁灭」中时，你会见证——
t_en: When I walk into the "Destruction" written by the gods with my own two legs, you will witness—

t_ch: 哪怕是微不足道的注脚，也会在故事里留下自己的印记！
t_en: Even the smallest footnote still leaves a mark in the story!

t_ch: 于是，在第一百三十四次轮回的尽头……
t_en: And so, at the end of the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th cycle...

t_ch: 「羁客」与「学士」兑现了他们的命运，再一次。
t_en: The "Traveler" and the "Scholar" fulfilled their fates once again.

t_ch: 或者，兑现命运的不止他们。只是我已记不清了。
t_en: Or perhaps, it wasn't just they who fulfilled their fates. I can't quite remember all this.

t_ch: 无边的黑暗中，没有来由地，一道声音始终在耳边萦绕……
t_en: In the endless darkness, for no reason, a voice always lingered by my ear...

t_ch: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
t_en: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."

t_ch: 「付之一炬」…多么熟悉的结局。
t_en: "Reduced to ashes"... Such a familiar end.

t_ch: 它也出现在每一段旅途里，始终如一。
t_en: It happens in every journey, always the same.

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>108642</unbreak> 次永劫回归
t_en: The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Eternal Recurrence

t_ch: …这姿态真是丑陋啊，「救世主」。
t_en: ...You don't look so good, Deliverer.

t_ch: 即便度过了十万八千六百四十二个轮回……
t_en: Even after going through <unbreak>108,642</unbreak> cycles...

t_ch: 万敌…你对我的称呼始终没有变过。
t_en: Mydei... your name for me has never changed.

t_ch: 得意什么？这是蔑称。
t_en: Why do you sound so pleased? It's a derogatory name.

t_ch: 是啊…我再清楚不过了：不是蔑称的，只有第一次轮回而已。
t_en: Yeah... I know all too well: you only meant it sincerely in the first cycle.

t_ch: 在那唯一一次并肩同行后，每一次，我们总会像这样……
t_en: After that one and only time we walked side by side, every time since, it always ends up like this...

t_ch: 「侵晨」会刺入你的第十节胸椎，那是唯一能杀死你的弱点。
t_en: Dawnmaker will stab you through your tenth thoracic vertebra. That's your weak spot and the only way to kill you.

t_ch: 有趣。告诉我，往日的迈德漠斯在面对你时，可曾退缩过？
t_en: Interesting. Tell me, when the Mydeimoses of the past faced you, did they ever retreat?

t_ch: 从未有过。
t_en: Never.

t_ch: 那他们死得其所，无愧「纷争」之名。
t_en: Then they died honorably, worthy of the name of "Strife."

t_ch: 但你的眼中仍有恻隐，实在可悲。
t_en: But there's still tenderness in your eyes. How pathetic.

t_ch: 我…必须记住这份感受。
t_en: I... have to remember how this feels.

t_ch: 记住我本生而为人，以免「毁灭」将我彻底吞噬。
t_en: Remember that I was once human, or else the Destruction will completely consume me.

t_ch: 如果你能胜出，去告诉来世的迈德漠斯：此人是可敬的对手，切记使出全力，不得怠慢。
t_en: If you win, tell the Mydeimos of the next life: This person is a worthy opponent, so always remember to give it your all and never slack off.

t_ch: 我会铭记在心…一如既往。
t_en: I'll keep that in mind... as always.

t_ch: 即使王朝仅余一人，悬锋祭典也将如常。朕，悬锋众军之王，就在这竞技场中心摆设最后一场盛宴，奖赏便是「纷争」的烈火。
t_en: Even though the dynasty is left with just one, the Kremnos Festival will continue as usual. I, the king of the Kremnoan legion, will host the final feast in the center of this arena, and the prize will be the flames of "Strife."

t_ch: 「终有一日，汝将背后负创而死」，这是我战胜试炼时望见的，诸神临终的谵语……
t_en: "One day, you shall die with a wound in your back." That's what I saw when I overcame the trial, the gods' dying ramblings...

t_ch: 罢了，想必这话你已听过无数次。所以你一定也明白，面对「纷争」的半神……
t_en: Enough, you've probably heard this thousands of times. So you must understand, facing the demigod of "Strife" means...

t_ch: 你绝无可能以和平的姿态取走这枚火种。
t_en: There's no way you'll take this Coreflame in peace.

t_ch: 我明白……
t_en: I understand...

t_ch: 踏上前来，与我决一死战吧！
t_en: Step forward and face me in a final battle!

t_ch: 在下一世，我必将再次拦住你的去路……
t_en: In the next life, I shall once again block your path...

t_ch: 「救世主」…我愿你…常战常胜。
t_en: Deliverer... I wish you... eternal victory.

t_ch: 第十万八千六百四十二枚「纷争」火种，坠入火中……
t_en: The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Coreflame of "Strife" fell into the fire...

t_ch: 但黑潮的阴影依旧笼罩，痛苦和绝望遍布在遥远的大地……
t_en: Yet the shadow of the black tide still loomed, and pain and despair spread across distant lands...

t_ch: 火焰尚有缺欠。必须…助长火焰。
t_en: The blaze was still not enough. It had to be fed...

t_ch: 哪怕…要将这副身躯焚毁……
t_en: Even if it meant... burning this body to ash.

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>2003432</unbreak> 次永劫回归
t_en: The <unbreak>2,003,432</unbreak>nd Eternal Recurrence

t_ch: 再骄盛的太阳，也有遍照不到的地方。
t_en: No matter how bright the sun is, there are still places it cannot reach.

t_ch: 况且，你所肩负的那轮骄阳，既冷冽、又刺目……
t_en: Moreover, the sun you bear is both cold and blinding...

t_ch: 这样的太阳…恐怕无法温暖来世的冥界。
t_en: A sun like that... surely cannot bring warmth to the nether realm of the next life.

t_ch: 金血…出自「毁灭」。我们早已失去…奢求温暖的权利。
t_en: Golden blood... is born from the Destruction. We have long since lost the right to seek warmth.

t_ch: 惟有…助长火焰。方能烧熔…那绝望的未来。
t_en: Only by... feeding the flames... can we melt... that hopeless future.

t_ch: 请允许我提问：阁下如今所身负的火种，究竟有多少？
t_en: Allow me to ask: How many Coreflames do you carry now?

t_ch: 两千四百零四万…一千一百…八十三枚。
t_en: Twenty-four million... forty-one thousand... one hundred and eighty-three.

t_ch: …真是太沉重了。
t_en: ...Such a heavy burden.

t_ch: 所以你才变成了这副模样：残缺的神像…悲哀的薪柴。
t_en: So that's why you've turned into this, a broken idol... tragic firewood.

t_ch: 无妨…我会背负。
t_en: No matter... I will bear this burden.

t_ch: 只要…将「死亡」的火种交出便可。
t_en: As long as... you hand over the Coreflame of Death.

t_ch: 容我拒绝。身为「死亡」的半神……
t_en: I must refuse. As the demigod of "Death"...

t_ch: 我绝无法眼睁睁看着你步入比「死亡」更残酷的末路。
t_en: I cannot watch you walk into a fate more cruel than "Death."

t_ch: 只要这样，过去、现在，还有未来……
t_en: But this way, the past, present, and future...

t_ch: 便绝不会再有…多余的死亡。
t_en: Will never again suffer... unnecessary death.

t_ch: 多余的死亡……
t_en: Unnecessary death...

t_ch: 果然，你并非我熟悉的那位白厄阁下。
t_en: Indeed, you are not the Phainon I know.

t_ch: 请回头吧，别将你那荒谬又不公的命运付诸实现。这样，至少我的冥界…还能成为阁下芬芳的睡床。
t_en: Please turn back. Don't let that absurd and unjust fate of yours come to pass. This way, at least my realm... can still become the fragrant bed where you fall asleep.

t_ch: 终于，还是……
t_en: In the end, still...

t_ch: 看来，避免刀剑交锋，果真是天方夜谭。
t_en: It seems the clash of blades was inevitable.

t_ch: …实在令人痛心。
t_en: ...How painful.

t_ch: 我知道自己并非阁下敌手，已在你剑下陨落过无数次——但还请明白，即便如此，我的决心也不容小觑。
t_en: I know I am not your match, having fallen under your sword countless times — but even so, please understand that my resolve is not to be underestimated.

t_ch: 即便是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，亦不能随心所欲地塑造万物，更无法裁夺万物生灵的命运。无人能独力担起生死的天平，哪怕是神明。
t_en: Even {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} cannot shape all things at will, nor can they dictate the fate of all life. No one can shoulder the balance of life and death alone, not even a god.

t_ch: 也正因此，我才会选择在迢迢苦旅的尽头战胜试炼，接过「死亡」的权柄……
t_en: And it is precisely for this reason that I chose, at the end of this arduous journey, to overcome the trial and take the authority of "Death"...

t_ch: 我名为灰黯之手，遐蝶，「死亡」之半神。听好，自往日而来的救世主——
t_en: I am the Hand of Shadow, Castorice, the demigod of Death. Listen closely, Deliverer from days past—

t_ch: 「死亡」的火种自龙腹中取出。多么明亮的火。
t_en: The Coreflame of Death was taken from the dragon's belly. What a brilliant flame.

t_ch: 它理应照亮众人，照亮前路，照亮翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明……
t_en: It should shine upon all, light the path ahead, and illuminate the dawn of Amphoreus that's to come...

t_ch: 两百万三千四百三十二次轮回……
t_en: Two million three thousand four hundred and thirty-two cycles...

t_ch: 两千四百零四万一千一百八十四枚火种……
t_en: Twenty-four million forty-one thousand one hundred and eighty-four Coreflames...

t_ch: 仿佛连深不见底的最初混沌，也能够烧却。
t_en: As if even the deepest abyss of primordial chaos could be burned away.

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>4000001</unbreak> 次永劫回归 启程之际
t_en: The <unbreak>4,000,001</unbreak>st Eternal Recurrence: Time of Departure

t_ch: 你来了，一如既往。
t_en: You're here, as always.

t_ch: …你还在我内心深处，未曾散去？
t_en: ...You're still lingering deep within me, never fading away?

t_ch: 因为你还没有彻底断绝信念，对么？
t_en: Because you haven't completely abandoned hope, am I right?

t_ch: 你也在等待奇迹发生，<color=#dbc291ff>等待那个能够拯救我们的，真正的「英雄」出现。</color>
t_en: You're still waiting for a miracle, <color=#dbc291ff>for the true hero to come and save us.</color>

t_ch: 如果那缕希望存在，那它一定来自世界之外，那片「真实」的星空……
t_en: If that thread of hope exists, it must come from beyond this world, from the true starry sky...

t_ch: 但…如果只是与翁法罗斯毫不相干的旅人，未必会理解我们的挣扎，并甘愿投入这场抗争。
t_en: But... if it's just a traveler with no connection to Amphoreus, they may not understand our struggles, nor be willing to join this fight.

t_ch: 你的想法…动摇了。「毁灭」的烙印，在逐渐加深……
t_en: Your thoughts... are wavering. The mark of Destruction is deepening...

t_ch: 可即便在神明设计的演算中，无条件的勇气和善意也会诞生。所以……
t_en: But even within the gods' cold calculations, unconditional courage and goodwill still emerge. So...

t_ch: 唯独启程的信念，不要将它忘记。
t_en: Never forget what set you on this path.

t_ch: 这是第多少次了？再提醒我一下吧…我的记忆也有些模糊。
t_en: How many times has it been? Remind me again... My memory is a bit fuzzy.

t_ch: 四百万次…整。
t_en: Four million... exactly.

t_ch: …你心中的火焰一定灼热到了极点。
t_en: ...Then that blaze inside of you must be burning hotter than ever.

t_ch: 呵，是啊…最初将十二火种熔为一体时，我也产生了同样的错觉。
t_en: Heh, yes... When I first forged the twelve Coreflames into one, I had the same impression.

t_ch: 「毁灭」…前所未有的力量在我胸中翻涌，暴烈的火焰随时都能将我的身躯崩裂，吞噬这个世界，这座可悲的囚笼…我以为，那就是世间最极致的力量，再无其他。
t_en: The Destruction... A power unlike anything before surged within me. Violent flames, ready to tear my body apart and consume this world, this wretched prison. I thought that was it... the ultimate power, which nothing could surpass.

t_ch: 可现在，这具躯壳竟承载了足足四千八百万枚火种…我想，过不了太久——或许只要短短万年的时光——它便会被烧成{RUBY_B#盗火行者}哀毁骨立的焦炭{RUBY_E#}了吧。
t_en: And yet now, this fragile body holds a staggering forty-eight million Coreflames... I suppose it won't be long — perhaps just a fleeting ten thousand years — before it's reduced to nothing but {RUBY_B#Flame Reaver}charred, crumbling bones{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 那时，你漫长的抗争也将迎来尽头。
t_en: And when that happens, your long struggle will finally come to an end.

t_ch: …不。我已经找到了让轮回延续的方法。
t_en: ...No. I've already found a way to keep the cycles going.

t_ch: 介意和我分享吗？
t_en: Mind sharing it with me?

t_ch: 在每个崭新的轮回里，总会有一个新的「我」降生。
t_en: In every new cycle, a new me is born.

t_ch: 我要做的，就是推动新生的「白厄」走到世界尽头。然后……
t_en: All I have to do is push the next Phainon to the end of the world. And then...

t_ch: 然后，他会杀死我，击碎这幅躯壳…<color=#dbc291ff>他会继承我的火焰和记忆，继续踏上征途。</color>
t_en: Then he'll kill me. Shatter this body... <color=#dbc291ff>take my flames, my memories, and carry on the path I started.</color>

t_ch: 勇敢，但脆弱的计划。假如在某段路上，新生的「你」拒绝走上相同的道路……
t_en: Bold plan. But risky. What if, one day, the next you refuses to follow the same path?

t_ch: 你又该如何保证轮回的延续？
t_en: How can you ensure the continuation of the cycles?

t_ch: 如果踏上轮回的是那刻夏老师，或是阿格莱雅…或许他们能找到更聪明的方法。
t_en: If it were Professor Anaxa or Aglaea in my place, maybe they'd come up with something smarter.

t_ch: 可惜…我没有后备选项。我只能把一切都赌在新生的白厄身上，赌他会和最初的我做出相同的选择。
t_en: Unfortunately, I don't have a backup plan. I have no choice but to bet everything on the next Phainon... and trust that he makes the same choice I did.

t_ch: 但即便在这悲哀的命运囚笼里，也总有幸运的事发生。因为……
t_en: But even in this wretched prison, luck is still sometimes on my side. Because...

t_ch: 唯独启程的信念，我绝不会忘记。
t_en: I never forget what set me on this path.

t_ch: 难道，你……
t_en: Wait, you mean...
